title: I Release Isolation in Big Decisions and Allow Aligned Support
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that major wealth decisions must be navigated alone
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 74 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the feeling of being alone in large financial decisions. The allow names the expectation of aligned advisors, mentors, and partners arriving at the right time.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 74 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 74 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 74 theme: attracting the right advisors and deals. The release names the habit of navigating large financial decisions without support. The allow names the expectation of the right people arriving.
I am ready to release every belief that I must navigate large financial decisions alone or without the right people beside me. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the perfect advisors, mentors, and partners to arrive at exactly the right time and support my vision fully. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 74 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
